fab_section_md: - Crown prince and heir to Aerys II; slain by Robert Baratheon on the Trident. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:71)
identity_line: Rhaegar Targaryen — Crown prince and heir to Aerys II; slain by Robert Baratheon on the Trident.

fab_section_md: - A dwarf of lowly birth, not wellborn like Tyrion; the fool at court during the events leading up to and through much of the Dance of the Dragons, and an observer. Semiliterate, he later dictated his story, giving the most scandalous account of the Dance. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:249)
